questions.question: Explain the key benefits of a Web-Enabled Data Warehouse. (15 marks)
A company's sales data for the past year is stored in a relational database. Describe how this data could be transformed into a Web-Enabled Data Warehouse. (20 marks)
A company has a requirement to provide OLAP (Online Analytical Processing) capabilities on the web. Discuss the technical requirements and tools that would be necessary to achieve this. (25 marks)
